name: Spectrum Gusto Soup For Cat With Tuna And Pumpkin 50g
shortDescription: Treat your feline friend to a delightful snack experience with SPECTRUM GUSTO Soup for Cats! Appropriate for any Cat/Kitten as a healthy treat but not a substitute for a complete balanced food. Make sufficient drinking water available.
description: The soup can be given as a complementary food or as a daily reward. You can give small amounts at a time using a spoon. Treat your feline friend to a delightful snack experience with SPECTRUM GUSTO Soup for Cats! This premium wet food combines tender tuna and nutritious pumpkin, creating a savory and satisfying meal that your cat will love. Contents: Water, Tuna fillet 25.40%, Pumpkin 4.7%, Fish broth, Natural thickener (Tapioca starch (E1442), Guar gum (E412)). Nutrient Components: Crude Protein 9%, Crude Fat 0.2%, Crude Ash 1%, Crude Fiber 0.1%, Moisture 90%. Key Features: High-Quality Ingredients: Made with real tuna, rich in essential proteins and omega fatty acids, ensuring your cat gets the nutrition they need. Nutritious Pumpkin: Packed with vitamins and fiber, pumpkin supports healthy digestion and adds a delicious, creamy texture. Irresistible Flavor: A gourmet soup that entices even the pickiest eaters, making mealtime a joyful experience. Convenient Portion Size: Perfectly portioned at 50g, ideal for a single serving or as a tasty topper for dry food. Give your cat the flavor and nutrition they deserve with SPECTRUM GUSTO Soup for Cats – a delicious way to keep them happy and healthy! Always have fresh drinking water available for your cat. See imprint on package.
